name_cn:
Genuine quality
5NF460, new mini bucket bag, made of top-grade imported lambskin, super soft leather, great value, versatile for various styles, very cute and playful, can be worn crossbody, shoulder, hand, or backpack, multi-functional, small but very spacious, dimensions: 17X14X6CM, comes with original packaging
